rectified_nodes.fix_description: Added control_flow b3->b7 to connect to nearest downstream usage.
Added data_flow b2->b4 to establish dependency on the preceding control_if.
Added contains b1->b5 to establish containment from the function, and control_flow b5->b7 to ensure flow to the next statement.
Added control_flow b6->b7 to re-establish connection to the nearest downstream usage, as the existing edge was considered invalid by diagnosis.
Added contains b1->b7 to re-establish containment from the function, as the existing edge was considered invalid by diagnosis.
Added control_flow b7->b8 to re-establish the return path, as the existing edge was considered invalid by diagnosis, and ensure all paths lead to return.
